name: Henan Qingshuiyuan Technology CO.,Ltd
summary: Henan Qingshuiyuan Technology CO.,Ltd manufactures and sells water treatment chemicals in primarily in China. The company offers phosphonate, phosphonate salts, phosphorous acid, polymer, corrosion inhibitor, bactericide, and algaecide chemicals. Its phosphonates and polymers are used in cooling and boiler water treatment, oil field water treatment, textile applications, pigment dispersant, pulp and paper bleaching, dairy cleaners, vehicle wash, cosmetics/shampoos, metal finishing, desalination operations, scale removal swimming pools, and others. The company also exports its products. Henan Qingshuiyuan Technology CO.,Ltd was founded in 1995 and is based in Jiyuan, China.
